text: Ever wondered how ship noise affects ocean life? From cargo ships to cruise liners, vessels create a symphony of sounds underwater. But this noise isn’t just background music; it disrupts communication among marine animals. Studies show that species like dolphins and whales rely on sound to navigate and find food. Imagine trying to talk in a crowded room—difficult, right? That’s similar to what they face. Reducing ship noise could restore balance, allowing these creatures to thrive again. Curious about more ocean mysteries? Hit subscribe for deep dives into science!
